channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: 3x areas of broken pavement- look like previous repairs have failed, 22nd June
item.description:
Outside drive of no 11, outside of grasses area of number 10 and outside number 9, just before the drop kerb. All on the kerb line, in line with kerb stones, they all have loose stone in them. Also dinner plate size area in line with tree at number 10, loose stone in, caused Amazon driver to trip over. All pavements at the bottom of cul de sac are in poor condition and could do with extensive work. I am delivering leaflets and I have slipped and lost my balance, I regularly deliver leaflets here and these pavements are appalling and getting worse.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cousley Close, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overgrown grass, 22nd June
item.description:
Dear Sir/Madam, I am writing to you in my capacity as Chair of the 11th Hucclecote Scout Group. Our Scout HQ backs onto a public open space on Deer Park Road, which our group has access to and uses regularly for activities. I wanted to bring to your attention that the grass on this green open space has become very overgrown. Would it be possible to arrange for your grounds maintenance team to visit and cut the grass? Please let me know if you need any further information, such as the exact location or access details, to help schedule this work. Thank you for your time, and I look forward to hearing from you. Kind regards, Rich Holmes
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Deer Park Road, Hucclecote, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The drain is blocked problem, 22nd June
item.description:
Please pass to relevant ahr covering this area. Damaged channel kerb make safe raised 22.06.26 This appears to be an offlet for rainwater but no evidence of broadbox. Please arrange permanent repair.
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW10 Potholes problem, 22nd June
item.description:
Sink hole in footway 2hr in hours emergency cover with barriers Traffic lights TM Opposite Stone Cottage (CW10 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Kerbs and Channels problem, 22nd June
item.description:
ENWD with Standard TM please make safe x1 loose channel kerb (CW Edge Kerbing & Channels)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 22nd June
item.description:
Give and take 28 days please cut back overgrown hedge and brambles and vegetation and tree branches growing out into footway approx 10 meters x3 meters temporary footway closure (Overgrown Hedge)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole outside 46 Brooklands Park, 22nd June
item.description:
On pavement in front of driveway of 46 Brooklands Park Longlevens Gloucester Gl2 0DP
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Richmond Gardens, Longlevens, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 22nd June
item.description:
ARBS TEAM REQUIRED STATS REQUIRED PLEASE CUT BACK ALL LOW BRANCHES UNDER 2.5M OVER FOOTWAY 5.5 OVER CARRIAGEWAY 2 X TREES ROAD AND FOOTWAY CLOSED (Overgrown Tree)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pavement blocked by hardcore, 22nd June
item.description:
Outside 15 Arle Drive. This householder is resurfacing their driveway. A large amount of hardcore has been depsoited on the pavement completely blocking it.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 19, Arle Drive, Kingsditch, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Obstruction by unpermitted skip, scaffolding, building material on pavement
